name: Decoupled Layout Pass
requirements: Buffered Surfaces spec (to paint into calculated Rects)

userStory.iWant: to calculate the geometry of my app before I render its content
userStory.soThat: I can implement floating menus, relative tooltips, and complex z-indexing.

acceptanceCriteria: The layout function returns a tree of Rect objects (x, y, w, h)
A separate paint() function accepts a Rect and a Surface
Layout information is persistent across frames for optimized invalidation
Portal/Overlay components can request a Rect from a 'target' ID
backwardCompatibility: Current layout functions will be refactored to internalize this two-pass logic, maintaining the same string-based output for existing consumers while exposing the new Rect-based API.

outScope: Individual component rendering (stays in paint pass)

testPlan.goldenPath: Pass a 3-cell Flex container to the layout engine and assert that the resulting Rects (A, B, C) sum exactly to the container dimensions and do not overlap.
edgeCases: Dynamic resizing resulting in invalid geometry
testPlan.fuzzStress: Generate 1000 deeply-nested layout nodes (10 levels deep) and measure the time to resolve all Rects.
failureCases: Infinite loops during layout resolution (e.g. mutually dependent widths)
